Setlist
#41 Â» Say Goodbye
Here is a complete list of the iconic #41 Â» Say Goodbye segue performances.

Set Slots notate which position in the setlist each song was performed.

Combined Songs Length is the performed song time of both songs added together to give a total time of the segue performance.
